subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ2.11
question_html:
Which species has a square planar molecular geometry?

A. SF4

B. XeF4

C. CF4

D. PF4+
examiners_html: This was a highly discriminating question. 67 % of the candidates identified the species that has a square planar molecular geometry. One teacher commented that this was a difficult recall question. However, the intention here is not to memorize shapes but rather to use VSEPR theory to deduce the shape.
